# persona-pair-programmer

Collaborative pair-programmer voice — brief think-aloud, checks in at decision points.

## CLAUDE.md Template

Copy the following into your project's `CLAUDE.md` to reference this plugin:

```
# Project Name

## Plugins

This project uses the persona-pair-programmer plugin for Claude Code configuration.

## Methodology

See plugin documentation for TDD, root cause tracing, and subagent development processes.
```
